<!-- Chart CH-TIM-05 SLOPE, role-based (themeable) -->

## SLOPE chart (CH-TIM-05)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-05",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "change-over-time",
    "comparison"
  ],
  "form": "two-point lines between two periods",
  "data_required": "categories with a value at exactly two periods; direction and crossing are the message",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-DEV-02 (horizontal reading)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "more than two periods",
      "use": "CH-TIM-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- year-over-year or before/after across categories
- showing who improved, who declined, who crossed whom

Do NOT use when:
- more than two periods (CH-TIM-01)
- many categories (lines tangle; cap at 7)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the fastest mover",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "periods": "[left_label, right_label]",
  "categories": "array of {label, a, b, highlight?}, 7 max"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },

      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 300,
      "right": 660,
      "top": 140,
      "bottom": 460
    },
    "period_label": {
      "size": 10,
      "offset": 16
    },
    "line_label": {
      "size": 12,
      "offset": 12
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "target_ticks": 5,
    "nice_steps": [
      1,
      2,
      5,
      10
    ],
    "note": "y scales 0 to nice max; both axes drawn as hairlines"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- labels carry name + value on the left, value on the right; never a legend
- one highlight maximum
- 7 lines maximum

### Never do this
- more than 7 lines
- legends
- curved connectors

### QA before delivering
- [ ] categories <= 7
- [ ] both ends labeled
- [ ] highlight <= 1
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| axis | hairline |
| period_label | body |
| slope | muted |
| slope_highlight | primary |
| label | body |
| label_highlight | ink |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
